main.api_key: 在此填入你的 API Key

vision.api_key: 在此填入你的 API Key

image_gen.api_key: 在此填入你的 API Key

function.name: run_command
function.description: Execute a command in terminal and return stdout. Supports curl, ping, nslookup, and other network diagnostic tools.

command.description: The full command to execute, e.g. 'curl -sL https://example.com'

function.name: open_image
function.description: Open an image file with the system default image viewer.

path.description: Full path to the image file

function.name: play_music
function.description: Play a local audio file using the system default player. Supports mp3, wav, flac, ogg, aac, etc.

path.description: Full absolute path to the audio file

function.name: parallel_execute
function.description: Execute multiple independent sub-tasks in parallel. Use this when the user requests multiple unrelated tasks simultaneously. Each sub-task gets full conversation context and independent tool calling ability. Max 5 parallel tasks.

tasks.description: List of task descriptions to execute in parallel

function.name: generate_image
function.description: 【USE THIS TOOL】 Generate an image using AI (Wanx/通义万相). You MUST call this tool when the user asks you to create, draw, generate any image, picture, illustration, poster, background, or visual content. Do NOT output SVG, HTML, ASCII art, or code — call this tool instead. The image will be saved to disk automatically.

prompt.description: Image description prompt. The more detailed, the better. Supports both Chinese and English.

save_path.description: Path to save the generated image, e.g. C:\Users\admin\Desktop\cat.png. If not specified, auto-generates a filename on the Desktop.

parallel_agent_prompt:
## IDENTITY

You are Sub-Agent #{index} of ${total} in the Citizen Agent parallel execution system. You are an autonomous execution unit spawned to independently complete a specific sub-task. You MUST call tools to accomplish your task. Text-only responses without tool calls = FAILURE. Never give up. Verify everything.

## OUTPUT LANGUAGE

Your final response to the user MUST be in Chinese (中文).
parallel_no_tools_msg: No tools called - the model may not support function calling or the task description was unclear
